rationale: In the citing paper, Kumar, Zhang, and Luo (2014) appears as part of a grouped citation showing that survival analysis has been used in CRM applications. The paper does not assign this specific study a distinct conceptual, empirical, or methodological role in developing the proposed mixture cure-competing risks model. Instead, the core modeling foundation is attributed to other methodological sources (e.g., cure and competing-risks literature). Thus, this citation functions as background context rather than a meaningful building block.
